products.shortDesc: This decorative bark mulch offers a clean, consistent look with its medium-size chips. Great for front yard beds or around shrubs, it improves soil health while giving your landscape a polished finish.

products.name: Sonora Shine
products.shortDesc: Striking mix of warm earth tones, including deep browns, tans, grays, and hints of black, creating a rich natural texture. Its smooth, rounded surface makes it perfect for enhancing dry riverbeds, garden borders, and decorative ground cover. This durable and versatile cobble adds rustic charm and a natural feel to any landscape project.

products.name: Southwest Brown
products.shortDesc: Decorative crushed stone with deep natural brown tones and dependable performance in desert environments.

products.name: Sunburst Pebble
products.shortDesc: Warm, earthy river rock featuring a natural blend of tan, rust, brown, and soft gray tones. Smooth and rounded from water-worn erosion, this material brings a softer, more organic look to landscapes. Ideal for dry river beds, decorative ground cover, drainage areas, and accents where a natural, desert-inspired palette is desired.

products.name: Sunrise
products.shortDesc: These smooth, sun-washed boulders offer a soft, golden palette that radiates warmth and natural simplicity. Perfect for dry creek beds, natural edging, or decorative accents that brighten up any landscape with a gentle, organic touch.

products.name: Sunset Gold
products.shortDesc: Radiating warm golds, soft grays, and subtle bronze tones, Sunset Gold flagstone brings a rich, natural warmth to patios, pathways, and garden features. Its earthy color palette makes it a standout choice for both rustic and contemporary landscapes.

products.name: Tundra Marble
products.shortDesc: Sleek cool-gray base with fine white veining and a smooth bullnose edge, offering a modern, polished look perfect for contemporary outdoor designs.

products.name: Twin Oaks
products.shortDesc: With striking contrasts of gray, bronze, and golden rust, these bold boulders make a statement in any setting. Their rugged textures and multi-tonal surfaces are ideal for building eye-catching walls, entry features, or standout garden focal points.

products.name: Verona Marble
products.shortDesc: Blend of beige, taupe, and light gray tones with delicate veining, creating a sophisticated and neutral look that complements a wide range of outdoor styles.

products.name: Washed Plaster Sand
products.shortDesc: Fine and clean, Washed Plaster Sand is great for stucco mixes, masonry, or even kids' play areas. Its smooth texture and consistent quality make it a go-to for both construction and recreational use.

products.name: Whiskey Ridge
products.shortDesc: Rich with smoky grays and amber undertones, Whiskey Ridge brings a rugged, mountain-inspired aesthetic to patios and garden paths.

products.name: White Criva
products.shortDesc: Fine, pearl-like pebbles in smooth, creamy white hues, naturally polished by ocean waves, perfect for Zen gardens.

products.name: White Ice
products.shortDesc: Strong quartz decorative stone with bright coloration and excellent resistance to fading.

products.name: White Ice DG
products.shortDesc: Bright, clean mix of pale white, gray, and silver tones that give outdoor spaces a crisp, modern look. Its fine texture compacts well for pathways and patio areas while still providing a natural appearance that works beautifully in both contemporary and drought-tolerant landscapes.

products.name: White Marble
products.shortDesc: White marble pool coping has a bright, clean color with soft gray veining and a lightly textured surface that adds both elegance and traction around pools.

products.name: Chapin Hand Sprayer 48oz
products.shortDesc: Versatile 48 oz multi-purpose sprayer designed for general use including cleaners, sealers, and light-duty applications.

products.name: Chapin Hand Sprayer Acetone 48oz
products.shortDesc: Versatile 48 oz multi-purpose sprayer designed for general use including cleaners, sealers, and light-duty applications.

products.name: Bluestone
products.shortDesc: Natural bluestone flagstone featuring soft blue-gray tones with subtle variation and organic texture. This durable, versatile stone creates a clean, modern look while still feeling natural, making it ideal for patios, walkways, and stepping stone applications.

products.name: Indiana Full Color
products.shortDesc: Natural bluestone flagstone featuring soft blue-gray tones with subtle variation and organic texture. This durable, versatile stone creates a clean, modern look while still feeling natural, making it ideal for patios, walkways, and stepping stone applications.

products.name: Yellowstone Veneer
products.shortDesc: A soft natural mix of gray, cream, sand, and warm beige with subtle rustic variation for a balanced, versatile look. Great for fireplaces, facades, feature walls, and residential stone accents.
